that was my loss streak, sin wheel bottom of deck, constant 1shot teams seeing combo turn 1, etc
actually pollux and kathi are strong T2 to beat those build with no/weak rushing plan or controlling means
but the two strongest deck in the environment are too strong at that
ogier's frontline tactice and catena helot💀
yeah I struggled alot with ogier/Chelot/Dori because ogier is just a lightening rod for sin stacks
How people can be so lucky
I try strat such as more draw cards and stuff
Have 0 card or posse to draw
I got like 6 games in a row where kath ramona draw the posse turn 1
The posse of draw 3 lowest skills
for me I just always replace all cards in my hand for the key wheels for that match up because i bring faros and greed
I literally do that... And i still have my combo at turn 4
It happened too often to be coincidence
but i can feel that too, kathi player can always have beachside memento on their hands at turn 2 XD
Sometimes i win against them despite them perfect draw
i mean, that build sacrifice a lot for that shot on Turn 2
and her cards at the late game kind of useless
Not forcibly, they one shot someone turn 2
But their sorel kill another one
And kath have more dmg the fewer your team are
Like it's not spread as much
if your deck cant cross the front and kill those on the back, then it's hard to against kathi tho
but for those who can, ramona is rly
I even aigis weakness to kath
Even with everything discarded through mulligan
your deck kinda single core, i mean the damage drops alot if 24 got shot
single core build sucks against kathi
And there is the problem of dealing with pollux team afterward
You play other team to try to counter kath, they can't play against pollux
And you lose against kath because your luck is shit
kinda forget the last time losing this two ()
If you don't get lucky through faros exalt
just go extreme on rushing opponent's core/ controlling
I mean... I literally do that
the fin wheel is not that good for tinct if u dun bring aurita for combo
You force kill tinct to convert her cards into illusion
hand of oblivion is much better
You feed illusion into aigis or celeste or 24 depending on the situation
So you can exalt stun or dmg or revive
combo with the posse you mean
Celeste revive into tinct with 100 alienus because she took a lot of dmg from fin
I made a lot of thinking for building teams like that
Personally, I don't really like the situation where you still have to wait a turn after completing a 3 card combo and just for killing 2 ppl :P

Miracle dawn + fin + 2 cost tinct does 88 dmg pierce, you do that to kill 2 enemies, then it kills tinct but gives her 100 alienus from fin damaging her, you convert her cards into illusion too so you can feed the others in case they lack alienus, the front will most likely die because of all the strike they ate during the previous turns, then you stun the last one
aurita + drowning in crimson + feast of decay can almost ace the opponent
It's a 3 kill turn + 1 stun so they can't do anything
Let me show you a replay
a lot of player bring gateway of retrospection now ()
